rows.invalid_regime: single UE full JCLS clock-state estimation
rows.masking_rule: plot as clockless/no-cooperation baseline or CRLB-free; do not report full-theta success
rows.semantics: noncooperative TOA/downlink localization; should not estimate full cooperative network clocks

rows.invalid_regime: rank-deficient one-epoch full theta treated as successful estimator
rows.masking_rule: mark nonreportable if rank deficient or nonconverged
rows.semantics: full model with clocks after reduced/preconditioned initialization

rows.invalid_regime: refinement of failed local estimate reported as unconditional success
rows.masking_rule: propagate upstream status and report covariance/information diagnostics
